data.title: Trump Tariffs To 'Plug The Hole' For Income Tax Cuts To Come: Economists Predict What More Could Be Expected
data.description: Craig Shapiro said tariffs will be used to fund tax cuts., while Mohamed El-Erian highlighted other possible implications.

data.title: Netflix Rolls Out Enhanced Subtitle & Dubbing Options On TV
data.description: Netflix has launched a new feature allowing users to select from a full list of available languages when streaming on TV. With non-English titles making up nearly a third of total viewership, this update enhances accessibility and supports multilingual learning.

data.title: McKesson Shares Up Over 2% After Key Signal
data.description: McKesson shares demonstrated a Power Inflow at $681.16, signaling a possible entry for traders, after which MCK rose up to 2.1%.
